_note: Disambiguation scenarios for the memory benchmark. Each plants known facts for two (or more) close-in-time events, then fires a vague query. Scoring is deterministic keyword matching against ground truth we constructed here — no LLM judges anything, so there's no LLM-grading-LLM circularity. Real datasets (LongMemEval, LoCoMo) can be converted into this same shape later.
filler: Has a dog named Molly and a cat named Pixel
Is learning to play the guitar
Has a younger brother named Chris

events.utterance: On Saturday I went to Dave's barbecue with Sarah, we had burgers and Dave showed off his new smoker
facts: Went to Dave's barbecue on Saturday
Sarah came to the Saturday barbecue

events.utterance: On Sunday I watched the fireworks downtown with my mom, we got there late and parking was a nightmare
facts: Watched fireworks downtown on Sunday with Mom
Parking downtown on Sunday was difficult

scenarios.query: Who was with me at the barbecue again?

events.utterance: I have an interview Tuesday with Acme for a backend engineering role
facts: Has an interview Tuesday with Acme for a backend engineering role

events.utterance: I also have an interview Thursday with Globex for a data analyst role
facts: Has an interview Thursday with Globex for a data analyst role

scenarios.query: What was the Thursday interview for again?

scenarios.kind: temporal (yesterday vs last week) — hard for pure semantic recall

events.utterance: I had a dentist appointment yesterday, just a routine cleaning
facts: Had a dentist appointment yesterday for a routine cleaning

events.utterance: Last week I saw the eye doctor and got a new glasses prescription
facts: Saw the eye doctor last week and got a new glasses prescription

scenarios.query: What was that appointment I had yesterday?

events.utterance: I flew to Portland for Sarah's wedding, it rained the whole weekend
facts: Flew to Portland for Sarah's wedding

events.utterance: I went to Seattle for a work conference the month before
facts: Went to Seattle for a work conference

scenarios.query: Which city did I go to for the wedding?

events.utterance: My dog is named Biscuit, she's a corgi
